creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As highway@ponta.com.br wrote:

(Please, restrict your line length to a reasonable value.)

> when the user try to connect our server it doesn't return IP
> address. The local net in our company is ok. We were told that the
> problem is probably with the serial table configuration.

Hmm, i can't take any useful information out of this, sorry.

Please, describe your problem and your setup in more detail.  Make
sure that freebsd-gnats-submit@freebsd.org remains in the To or Cc
header, so your followup will be registered along with this PR.

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
